title: sorghum flavum
intro: Sorghum flavum is a type of flowering plant in the sorghum genus, native to tropical Africa, characterized by its yellow or greenish-yellow flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sorghum flavum include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves, stems, or roots, which can be used to treat various ailments.
